Title: Owner Pickup Completion
Template: Owner picked up on [Current Date], Owner showed DL as proof of ID.

Title: EMR Initial Text
Template: Hi, this is Fond Memories texting you today about your pet [Pet's Name], we just wanted to let you know that the deadline to submit your wishes for your pets cremation is coming up soon and we still have yet to receive your final wishes. If you're having any trouble accessing the website or submitting those decisions to us, please give us a call at 281-919-1188 and would be happy to assist you. If you're not having any trouble, we would like to remind you that the decision period does close on [Decision Date].

Title: EMR Follow Up Text
Template: Hi, this is Fond Memories texting you again about your pet [Pet's Name], we just wanted to remind you that the deadline to submit your wishes for your pets cremation is coming up soon and we still have yet to receive your final wishes. If you're in need of assistance, please give us a call at 281-919-1188 and would be happy to help. If you're not having any trouble, we would like to remind you that the decision period does close on [Decision Date].

Title: Bounced Email Text
Template: Hi, this is Fond Memories texting you today about your pet [Pet's Name], we are following up with you as our system has flagged that you did not receive any of our emails reguarding your pets cremation. We want to help you get everything finalized ASAP, please give us a call at 281-919-1188 and would be happy to assist you. The original decision period closes on [Decision Date] but if you are unable to reach us before then we would be happy to provide you more time. We hope to hear from you soon.

Title: Everafter Art  Address Verification
Template:
Hi this is Fond Memories, who are preforming the cremation for [Pet's Name]. Your order contains a request for EverAfter Art - and we needd to verify your email & Mailing address, as that is how the EverAfter Art is returned to you upon completion.The email we have on file is [Email] and the address is [Address].

You can call (281)919-1188 or reply to this text. We are open Monday-Friday 9am-4pm any time in that window is a good time to call. Thank you and we hope to hear from you soon.
